problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: If Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus is applied to reversed, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
